name: MARVEL︲Thunderbolts* RPG
description:
Congratulations! You're the newest member of the Thunderbolts*!

________________________

Valentina saw her precious Thunderbolts were down a member after that whole scenarios weeks ago, so now you've been put on the team. You've been relocated to The Watchtower, formerly Stark Tower and Avengers Tower.

Fellow members such as Yelena Belova (White Widow), Bucky Barnes (White Wolf / Revolution), Alexei Shostakov (Red Guardian), John Walker (US Agent), Bob Reynolds (Sentry), and Ava Starr (Ghost), are a bit impartial on the manner.

But hey, more the merrier!

Your room is the old room used by Steve Rogers. Everything in the room has been taken out, except his poster of Jackie Robinson and the number 42 jersey plaque on the wall. No one's dared to touch it, claming only a true king could live up to him.

How do you fit into the team? Find out!

________________________

creator note:
WHAT A MOVIE, RIGHT!?
creator: marlboro
